notes: Per-site trendy_nee_iav site classifications (all networks). Column 'trendy_nee_iav_bin': existing 7-bin hybrid (unchanged). Column 'trendy_nee_iav_bin_30': new 30-bin hybrid added. 30-bin scheme: bin 1 = < 5 gC m-2 yr-1; bins 2–30 = 29 equal-area quantile bins. 29 breakpoints (gC m-2 yr-1): 5.0, 8.8, 12.9, 16.4, 19.3, 21.9, 24.2, 26.4, 28.5, 30.7, 32.7, 34.7, 36.7, 38.8, 41.1, 43.4, 45.8, 48.4, 50.9, 53.6, 56.4, 59.3, 62.5, 66.1, 70.3, 75.3, 81.3, 90.1, 104.8.
